SELECT value, value SIMILAR TO 'h.llo' AS match_hllo FROM test_strings;
SELECT value FROM test_strings WHERE value SIMILAR TO 'l+';
SELECT value, value SIMILAR TO 'hel*o' AS match_helstar FROM test_strings;
SELECT value, value SIMILAR TO '[a-z]+' AS match_alpha FROM test_strings WHERE value SIMILAR TO 'he.%';
SELECT ts.value FROM test_strings ts JOIN additional_strings as ads ON ts.value SIMILAR TO 'h%' AND ads.test_col SIMILAR TO '%test';
SELECT value FROM test_strings WHERE value SIMILAR TO '%llo%' AND value IN (SELECT test_col FROM additional_strings WHERE test_col SIMILAR TO '%example%');
SELECT value, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM additional_strings WHERE test_col SIMILAR TO '%[0-9]%') AS count_numbers FROM test_strings WHERE value SIMILAR TO 'h?llo';
